On July 16 last, during the pro-

hold. and with good grounds, that

Earl Rogers Is and was at the

& M.


Earl Rogers was one OF the law
yers who defended Patrick Calhoun
In the San Francisco graft prose-
cutiOns.


Earl Rogers has gained notoriety
on the Pacific coast through his
defense of rich criminals OF the
stamp Of the San Francisco hribe-
givers. -
To associate. Rogers with the idea

fully grasp. This u fact, not com
